headline: Zelenskyy 🇺🇦💪 'LAND GRAB' TALKS with Trump 🍊 & Putin 🐻 in UAE 🌴✈️
text:
Zelenskyy 🇺🇦🕶️ YEETS through the NIGHT 🌙💨 to Davos 🏔️❄️ after Russian BLACKOUT BOMBS 💣⚡ on Kyiv POWER GRID 🏙️🚫 – THOUSANDS of APARTMENT BLOCKS FREEZING THEIR BALLS OFF 🥶🍆 in WAR'S HARSHIEST WINTER ❄️😩! But ZELENSKIYY SLAYS 🔥📢: 'IT'S ALL ABOUT THE LAND 🗺️🍑 – Donbas INDUSTRIAL DADDY 💪🏭 still STUCK 😤!' Trilateral TALKFEST 🗣️🤝 incoming in UAE 🌴🕌 with US 🇺🇸🍊, RUSSIA 🐻🇷🇺, and UKRAINE 🇺🇦 – 'RUSKIES gotta COMPROMISE 🫡, not just US simping!'

Trump Daddy 🍊👑 calls Zelenskyy meetup 'GOOD VIBES ONLY 😎👍' while ENVOY STEVE WITKOFF 🕶️💼 (with Kushner bro-in-law Jared 💍🕺) JETSETS to Moscow 🐻🏰 OPTIMISTIC AF 🚀: 'ONE ISSUE LEFT 🔒 – IT'S SOLVABLE 💯, we've ITERATED that BAD BOY 📝🍆!' No deets, but Zelenskyy SPILLS ☕: EASTERN UKRAINE STATUS 🗺️❌ unsolved, US plan = DEMILITARIZED FREE ECON ZONE 🆓💰 in Donbas for KYIV SECURITY BLANKET 🛡️🇺🇸! Witkoff: 'BOTH SIDES WANNA WIN? DEAL DONE 🤑✋!' Then Abu Dhabi WORKING GROUPS 🛠️ on MILITARY 💥 + ECON BOOM 📈 post-Moscow.

Zelenskyy LOCKS IN 🔒 Trump SECURITY GUARANTEES 🛡️ for POST-DEAL Ukraine – NEEDS CONGRESS 👨‍⚖️ + PARLIAMENT rubber stamp 📜! 'NO GUARANTEES POP OFF WITHOUT US DADDY 🇺🇸💪 – UK/France COALITION 🫡🇬🇧🇫🇷 got BOOTS ON GROUND 👢🌍 but TRUMP BACKSTOP OR BUST!' Roasts EU SIMPS 🤡🇪🇺 for 'ENDLESS BICKERING 😩🚫 – Trump LOVES Europe ❤️ but HATES WEAK SAUCE!' Peskov Kremlin CLOWN 🤡🐻: 'TALKS CONTINUE 🗣️ on UKRAINE DRAMA 🎭... OPTIMISM? CRICKETS 🦗.' Putin covets WHOLE Donbas 🐻🍑 + Zaporizhzhia NUKE PLANT ☢️ seized 2022!

US 20-POINT PEACE BANGER 📋✨ 90% READY last month – Zelenskyy offers 40KM TROOP PULLBACK 🪖⬅️ from 25% Donetsk control for ECON ZONE 🆓🏭 if Russkies MIRROR 🪞! Zelenskyy JOKES 😂: 'Hope UAE knows we're CRASHING THEIR PARTY 🎉🌴!' Sends A-TEAM: Security boss Umerov 🛡️, spy daddy Budanov 🕵️‍♂️, office chief + Arakhamia negotiator 💼, Gen Staff Hnatov 🎖️ – SHIT'S GETTING REAL 🔥‼️! Land wars? More like DIPLOMATIC ORGY 💦🤝 – WILL PUTIN BEND THE KNEE 🧎‍♂️ or KEEP GRINDING EAST 📈😤?!
